penalties.description: Loop appears to be positioned approximately 2-3mm above the marked line on appendage

confidence_rationale: Loop positioning relative to mark difficult to assess precisely due to camera angle and lighting. Cinching quality and completion time well-observed. Some uncertainty in exact millimeter deviation measurement.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from mark due to camera angle and appendage curvature
Whether loop is positioned exactly at the marked line versus slightly above
technique_summary: Competent intermediate performance with systematic approach to loop deployment, placement, and cinching. Time within intermediate range but loop positioning appears slightly high relative to target mark.
strengths: Smooth loop deployment and maintenance of loop integrity
Appropriate cinching with good loop security
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise loop positioning at the marked line
Consider closer visual inspection before final cinching
Could reduce overall time by 10-15 seconds with more efficient deployment
